title: Write ferrum_extlib_draw_fb.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_draw_fb: Linux framebuffer (/dev/fb0) and embedded display targets. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: software rasterizer to memory buffer, flush callback for DMA/SPI/MMIO, double-buffering, pixel format conversion (RGB565, ARGB8888, etc.), no windowing system required, target: embedded Linux, RTOS displays.
